about.title: Premium Companions
about.description: We believe that geckos are more than just exotic pets. They are companions that bring wonder and connection into your life. Each gecko in our collection has been carefully selected and raised to ensure the perfect match for your family.

coreEssence.title: Purpose
coreEssence.description: A tiny tail wagging with endless happiness, the gecko gathering place.

values.title: Growth Record
values.description: We document the changes from baby to adult with data and photos to confirm healthy growth.

values.title: Space for Connection
values.description: We share the unique charm and personality of crested geckos through photos and videos.

values.title: Showcase & Share
values.description: We show off the 'beauty' of geckos with their unique patterns and colors, sharing the joy of life with reptiles.

values.title: Data History
values.description: As the number of geckos grows, we aim to be a digital space that systematically manages each individual's characteristics and history.

footer.description: Delivering value beyond precious companions. A premium gecko brand proposing a new companion culture.
